APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. LAURA A. FREE, Esq. of Mokri Vanis & Jones, LLP (Tel: 213-784-3220) for defendants Trader Joe's Company, and Acadia Realty Ltd Partnerships/555 9th Street LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS TRADER JOE'S COMPANY, AND ACADIA REALTY LTD PARTNERSHIP/555 9TH STREET LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' statute-of-limitations demurrer to the complaint is overruled.
Plaintiff says she slipped and fell in a Trader Joe's on October 30, 2018. On February 18, 2021, she sued for negligence and premises liability, and it is undisputed that the limitations period for each count is two years. However, Covid Emergency Rule 9 tolled statutes of limitations for 178 days in mid-2020, so the complaint is not time-barred.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
